issue_text: When a visitor submits a blog comment without providing an email address, the comment-notification email is sent twice. Sending the email also blocks the request, making commenting slow. A comment with a valid email should notify once; a comment without an email should not error or double-send.
issue_text_source: normalized-english (blind to fix location; symptom only)
notes: Control bug. Gold files are named for comment/email, so conventional search should reach them => expected NOT dark. Validates that the harness reports VARD ~= agent on findable bugs.
